failedAssertions.reason: CSI 300 data unavailable. IndexFetcher.fetch_and_store() has never been called, so index_cache.db is empty. Additionally, no API endpoint exposes index data (pair_candles only queries STOCK type). The code is implemented but the data pipeline was never initialized.
